name: method
value: Use this packet for prop-damage and vibration handoff only. UAV Realistic rows are flight-phase-inclusive fault envelopes, DJI Mini 2 rows are raw accelerometer spectra for a different two-blade vehicle, PADRE rows are normalized FFT feature matrices, and current damage-vibration rows are dimensionless runtime intensities. Do not calibrate a physical blade-pass notch from DJI Mini 2 without applying the alias rows.
